{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Skysworn headquarters
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] have a headquarters.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Soulsmith foundry]] is located in the [[Skysworn]]’s tower.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
